trades.reasoning: Top screener score (95) with all four bullish signals aligned: RSI in the ideal 55-70 momentum zone, MACD crossover, price well above SMA-20, and volume surge — strong entry setup with market conditions neutral-to-positive.

decisions.briefing: Markets showed modest strength today with NASDAQ leading at +0.9% and S&P 500 gaining +0.3%, a neutral but constructive tape. OLED continues to perform well and remains a hold. With $683 in cash and 5 open slots, deploying into NVT — the highest-conviction candidate with a clean momentum setup and no overbought conditions. One new position fills a slot and puts idle cash to work without overextending in an uncertain environment.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities edged higher on May 1st, with technology and growth names leading as the NASDAQ outpaced the broader S&P 500 by a notable margin. The divergence suggests institutional rotation into higher-beta tech and growth sectors, possibly driven by easing macro fears or positive earnings revisions in the semiconductor and software space. With no major negative catalysts, the market maintained a cautiously optimistic tone heading into the summer.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股於五月一日小幅走高，科技與成長股領漲，納斯達克指數漲幅明顯優於標普500。此分化走勢反映機構資金持續輪動至高貝塔科技與成長板塊，可能受到宏觀風險降溫或半導體、軟件行業盈利預期上調所帶動。在無重大負面消息的背景下，市場整體維持審慎樂觀態勢，並延續至夏季前的佈局節奏。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that have been rising and showing strong technical signals — like RSI in the bullish zone and MACD crossovers — on the bet that recent strength will continue. It works because trends tend to persist in the short term as more buyers pile in. The risk is that momentum can reverse sharply, which is why stop-losses and watching for overbought RSI (above 70) are important guardrails.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資是指買入近期持續上漲、技術指標強勁的股票——例如RSI處於多頭區間、MACD出現黃金交叉——押注短期趨勢會延續。其原理在於市場趨勢往往具有慣性，越來越多買家跟進會進一步推動股價。風險在於動能可能急轉直下，因此設置止損點並留意RSI超買（高於70）是重要的風險控管手段。
